title: I Want to Be a Shellfish
actors: Furankî Sakai, Michiyo Aratama, Kumi Mizuno
plot: On a post-war peaceful day in Japan, Toyomatsu Shimizu, a barber as well as a good father and husband, is suddenly arrested by the Prefectural Police as a war criminal and sued for murder. According to the accusation by GHQ, Toyom...
